## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/validate.sh` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck hooks/*.sh scripts/*.sh` is clean
- [ ] `claude plugin validate .` passes (if you have the CLI)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `version` bumped in `plugin.json` / `marketplace.json` if user-visible
- [ ] If Discipline A (source-verify) changed: re-ran a pressure scenario and noted
      baseline-vs-skill results below
